title: Prescribing Rest for Chronic Pain Was a Mistake. The Biology Demands Mechanical Load.
description: For decades, the standard medical advice for chronic musculoskeletal pain was immobilization — a protocol that turned out to be financially convenient and biologically catastrophic. New evidence confirms that exercising directly into moderate pain isn't just safe — it's mechanistically required to rewire the brain's pain-processing centers, and the opioid industry built around the alternative has cost the economy tens of billions of dollars.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Prescribing Rest for Chronic Pain Was a Mistake. The Biology Demands Mechanical Load.
